issues.description: Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn', not 'OnPlay'. Card activates at end of turn, not when played.
Condition missing. Should check 'HasCardOnBoard' (to verify card is in play) and hand size equals 0. Current condition 'Always' is incomplete.
Duration must be 'DuringYourTurn' per text '[End of Your Turn]'. This is a turn-specific trigger, not a permanent effect.
